1.description: get Kristiansand kommunenummer and geometry as GeoJSON

2.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons intersecting Kristiansand geometry (reduced national layer)

3.description: get flood zone polygons intersecting Kristiansand geometry (reduced national layer)

4.description: get buildings in Kristiansand with geometry and bygningid

5.description: find buildings that intersect storm polygons

6.description: collapse storm matches to one row per bygningid

7.description: find buildings that intersect flood polygons

8.description: collapse flood matches to one row per bygningid

9.description: keep buildings present in both storm and flood sets

10.description: sort by bygningid ascending and limit to 10

args.sql:
SELECT id, omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_GeomFromGeoJSON('"<REPLACE>"')::geometry) IS TRUE
LIMIT 1;

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_AsGeoJSON(omrade) AS geom_geojson
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_GeomFromGeoJSON(:geom)::geometry);
guard_error: {"executed": false, "error": "tool_validate_sql blocked.", "reason": "Step 2 has exhausted its SQL repair budget (2 attempts). Produce a new plan.", "step": 2, "action": "query"}

1.description: get Kristiansand municipality geometry and kommunenummer

4.description: get buildings in Kristiansand municipality (filter by kommunenummer)

5.description: reduce storm polygons to municipality extent (municipality ∩ storm)

6.description: reduce flood polygons to municipality extent (municipality ∩ flomareal gjentaksintervall=200)

7.description: find buildings that intersect storm polygons within the municipality

8.description: from buildings intersecting storm, keep those that also intersect flood polygons (both hazards)

9.description: collapse to one row per building (bygningid)

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna;
guard_error: {"executed": false, "error": "tool_validate_sql blocked.", "reason": "Step 2 has exhausted its SQL repair budget (2 attempts). Produce a new plan.", "step": 2, "action": "query"}
execution_error: {"executed": false, "step": 2, "action": "query", "error": "execute_query_step failed: Large unfiltered queries must include LIMIT or WHERE."}

1.description: get Kristiansand kommunenummer and municipality envelope WKT

2.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons intersecting municipality bbox

3.description: get flood-zone polygons intersecting municipality bbox

4.description: get buildings in Kristiansand municipality (filter by kommunenummer)

5.description: find buildings that intersect 200-year storm-surge polygons

6.description: find buildings that intersect 200-year flood polygons

7.description: keep buildings present in both spatial-join results (intersection by bygningid)

8.description: collapse to one row per bygningid

replan_trigger.error: Step 2 exhausted SQL repair budget (2 attempts).

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, ST_AsText(ST_Envelope(omrade)) AS envelope_wkt
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '4204'));
guard_error: {"executed": false, "error": "tool_validate_sql blocked.", "reason": "Step 2 has exhausted its SQL repair budget (2 attempts). Produce a new plan.", "step": 2, "action": "query"}
